description: A major local election is unfolding. You need to rapidly reconfigure the site into a breaking news hub. Change the Site Tagline to 'Live Election Coverage 2026'. Rename the 'News' category to 'Breaking News' and update its slug to 'breaking-news'. Publish the draft post 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results', make it a sticky post, and add it to the 'Primary Menu' with the CSS class 'breaking-pulse'.
